2026-04-17T05:13:15.2723794Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-17T05:13:15.2724319Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-17T05:13:15.2724740Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-17T05:13:15.2725612Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-17T05:13:15.2725925Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T05:13:15.2726166Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-17T05:13:15.2726330Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-17T05:13:15.2726514Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-17T05:13:15.2726689Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-17T05:13:15.2726926Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-17T05:13:15.2727137Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T05:13:15.2727429Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-17T05:13:15.2727688Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 issue(s) can be created.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Detailed issue description in Markdown. Labels must exist in the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"parent":{"description":"Parent issue number for creating sub-issues. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. This fixes a memory leak where completed executions\\naccumulated indefinitely in the ResponseExecutionTracker.\\n\\nAfter eviction, all API calls (GET, DELETE, Cancel, SSE replay) for\\ncompleted responses fall through to the storage provider, which is the\\ncorrect source of truth for persisted data.\\n\\nKey changes:\\n- ResponseExecutionTracker: replace MarkCompleted with TryEvict\\n- 2026-04-17T05:15:10.7147865Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-17T05:14:40.546319858Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"successfully downloaded text file (SHA: [REDACTED])","type":"text"},{"resource":{"mimeType":"text/plain; charset=utf-8","text":"﻿// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing Humanizer;\nusing Microsoft.TypeSpec.Generator.Expressions;\nusing Microsoft.TypeSpec.Generator.Primitives;\nusing Microsoft.TypeSpec.Generator.Providers;\nusing Microsoft.TypeSpec.Generator.Snippets;\nusing Microsoft.TypeSpec.Generator.Statements;\nusing System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing static Microsoft.TypeSpec.Generator.Snippets.Snippet;\n\nnamespace Azure.Generator.Management.Utilities\n{\n    internal class PropertyHelpers\n    {\n        public static IReadOnlyList\u003cPropertyProvider\u003e GetAllProperties(ModelProvider propertyModelProvider)\n        {\n            var result = new List\u003cPropertyProvider\u003e();\n            var baseType = propertyModelProvider.BaseModelProvider;\n            var baseTypes = new Stack\u003cModelProvider\u003e();\n\n            // Recursively get properties from base types\n            while (baseType is not null)\n            {\n                baseTypes.Push(baseType);\n                baseType = baseType.BaseModelProvider;\n            }\n            while (baseTypes.TryPop(out var item))\n            {\n                result.AddRange(item.Properties);\n                result.AddRange(item.CustomCodeView?.Properties ?? []);\n            }\n            result.AddRange(propertyModelProvider.Properties);\n            result.AddRange(propertyModelProvider.CustomCodeView?.Properties ?? []);\n            return result;\n        }\n\n        public static (bool IsReadOnly, bool? IncludeGetterNullCheck, bool IncludeSetterNullCheck) GetFlags(PropertyProvider property, PropertyProvider innerProperty)\n        {\n            var isInnerPropertyReadOnly = !innerProperty.Body.HasSetter;\n            var isPropertyReadOnly = !property.Body.HasSetter;\n            if (!isPropertyReadOnly \u0026\u0026 isInnerPropertyReadOnly)\n            {\n                if (HasDefaultPublicCtor(innerProperty.EnclosingType as ModelProvider))\n                {\n                    if (innerProperty.Type.Arguments.Count \u003e 0)\n                        return (true, true, false);\n                    else\n                        return (true, false, false);\n                }\n                else\n                {\n                    return (false, false, false);\n                }\n            }\n            else if (!isPropertyReadOnly \u0026\u0026 !isInnerPropertyReadOnly)\n            {\n                if (HasDefaultPublicCtor(innerProperty.EnclosingType as ModelProvider))\n                    return (false, false, true);\n                else\n                    return (false, false, false);\n            }\n\n            return (true, null, false);\n        }\n\n        private static bool HasDefaultPublicCtor(ModelProvider? innerModel)\n        {\n            if (innerModel is null)\n                return false;\n\n            foreach (var ctor in innerModel.Constructors)\n            {\n                if (ctor.Signature.Modifiers.HasFlag(MethodSignatureModifiers.Public) \u0026\u0026 !ctor.Signature.Parameters.Any())\n                    return true;\n            }\n\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        public static MethodBodyStatement BuildGetter(bool? includeGetterNullCheck, PropertyProvider internalProperty, TypeProvider innerModel, PropertyProvider innerProperty)\n        {\n            var checkNullExpression = This.Property(internalProperty.Name).Is(Null);\n            var shouldNullGuard = internalProperty.Type.IsNullable || internalProperty.WireInfo?.IsRequired == false || innerModel.Type.IsNullable;\n            // For collection types, we initialize the internal property if it's null and return the inner property.\n            if (innerProperty.Type.IsCollection \u0026\u0026 internalProperty.WireInfo?.IsRequired == true)\n            {\n                if (!internalProperty.Body.HasSetter)\n                {\n                    return Return(new TernaryConditionalExpression(checkNullExpression, Default, new MemberExpression(internalProperty, innerProperty.Name)));\n                }\n\n                return new List\u003cMethodBodyStatement\u003e {\n                    new IfStatement(checkNullExpression)\n                    {\n                        internalProperty.Assign(New.Instance(innerModel.Type)).Terminate()\n                    },\n                    Return(new MemberExpression(internalProperty, innerProperty.Name))\n                };\n            }\n\n            if (includeGetterNullCheck == true)\n            {\n                return new List\u003cMethodBodyStatement\u003e {\n                    new IfStatement(checkNullExpression)\n                    {\n                        internalProperty.Assign(New.Instance(innerModel.Type)).Terminate()\n                    },\n                    Return(new MemberExpression(internalProperty, innerProperty.Name))\n                };\n            }\n            else if (includeGetterNullCheck == false)\n            {\n                // For collection types with a settable internal property, initialize the internal property\n                // to avoid returning null, which would cause NullReferenceException during serialization.\n                if (innerProperty.Type.IsCollection \u0026\u0026 internalProperty.Body.HasSetter)\n                {\n                    return new List\u003cMethodBodyStatement\u003e {\n                        new IfStatement(checkNullExpression)\n
